title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Mahindra Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Mahindra Finance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Mahindra Finance in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra Finance:
Mahindra Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Finance!
